prompt: Create a polished studio fashion portrait of a confident young Black man standing in a 3/4 pose against a rich warm burnt-sienna and terracotta textured studio backdrop. Frame him from mid-thigh upward in a vertical portrait composition, body angled slightly to the viewer’s left, shoulders relaxed, one hand tucked into his trouser pocket and the other arm resting naturally at his side. He wears a sophisticated formal outfit: an ivory-white jacquard dinner jacket with subtle floral paisley texture, wide shawl lapels, a single black button, flap pockets, crisp white dress shirt with black studs, oversized black velvet bow tie with a small gold-and-black oval brooch at the center, black pocket square, fitted black trousers, a silver wristwatch, and a textured black flat cap. Use soft directional studio lighting from the front-left to reveal the jacket texture and create gentle shadows, with realistic skin tone, refined tailoring, high-end editorial styling, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on clothing details, and a premium magazine portrait mood. Keep the background plain except for painterly texture, no text, no logos, no props, no extra people.
